creator: phk@FreeBSD.org
text:
Attempting to `make patch` after deselecting GSTREAMER option fails:

    ===>  Applying extra patch /freebsd/ports/www/webkit2-gtk3/files/extra-patch-revert-7c0f13f37ec5
    1 out of 3 hunks failed--saving rejects to Source/WebCore/accessibility/AXObjectCache.cpp.rej
